canonical_definition: A scoring function for pretraining data detection based on the ratio of the perplexity of a text before and after it has been converted to lowercase.
papers: A Statistical Approach for Controlled Training Data Detection
Fine-tuning can Help Detect Pretraining Data from Large Language Models
